case_title: DOROTHY PAYNE VS. INTERNATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL et al

docket_entries.description: OSC HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAYNE, DOROTHY
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-09-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-25-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-09-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAYNE, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL CAMBLIN, JANE JONES, RUSSEL WEISS, LEONA DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-25-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-10-2008
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
